---
title: "AP Calculus AB Hub"
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">
### Welcome to AP Calculus AB!
This hub is your central command for the year. Whether you are reviewing today's lesson, visualizing a tricky concept, or grabbing a fresh copy of tonight's homework, everything you need is right here. 
</div>

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm}
::: {.card-header .bg-primary .text-white}
#### <i class="bi bi-book-half"></i> Interactive & Printable Textbook
:::
::: {.card-body}
Our notes are designed to bring calculus to life.

**👈 Select a chapter from the left sidebar to get started.**

* **Interactive Visualizations:** Throughout the digital text, you will find interactive tools (like 3D sliders for solids of revolution) to help build geometric intuition.
* **Click-to-Reveal Solutions:** Try the practice exercises on your own first, then click the yellow boxes to check the step-by-step breakdowns.
* **Printable Versions:** If you prefer pencil and paper, expand the resources menu on the left to download static PDF versions of the chapter notes.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm}
::: {.card-header .bg-secondary .text-white}
#### <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i> Resources
:::
::: {.card-body}
Looking for extra practice or reference materials? 

* [Extra Practice Exercises (PDF)](resources/suggested-homework.pdf)
* [Khan Academy AP Calculus AB Course](https://www.khanacademy.org/math/ap-calculus-ab)
* [AP Calculus AB Exam Practice](https://apstudents.collegeboard.org/courses/ap-calculus-ab/exam-practice)

<!-- * [**AP Exam Formula & Reference Sheet**](resources/reference.pdf) -->
:::
:::
:::

:::
